description: Determine the optimal (fewest) Olympic plates (25, 20, 15, 10, 5, 2.5, 1.25 kg) required for one side of a 20 kg barbell for the admin user's next Squat progression. The target weight is 2.5 kg above the heaviest Squat weight in the admin's workout history. Save the plate weights in descending order, one per line, to ~/next_squat_plates.txt.
